meta.purpose: Reasoning chains for why a motion decision is right or wrong.
meta.load_condition: Load when the user asks why, tradeoffs, diagnosis, quality review, or strategic choice.

reasoning_chains.conclusion: Choose attention path before choosing animation effects.
logic: Viewers process hierarchy before appreciating detail.
Complex motion without hierarchy creates cognitive load.
reasoning_chains.so_what: Ask what the viewer should notice first, second, and never.
